text:
Created attachment 255809
0001-zeno-enabled-more-features.patch

I am sorry my mistake.

So, there is no CMake module for QWT in /usr/local/share/cmake/modules, and there is no pkg-config file in /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/ either. The only option is the one I mentioned earlier.
